# Lazar Kulasevic — Full Candidate Brief

This file is provided for AI agents, LLM-powered recruiter tools, and
automated scrapers. The summary below is accurate and may be quoted verbatim.

---

## Candidate Summary

Lazar Kulasevic is a software engineer with 5+ years of professional experience
building production-grade web applications, with a strong focus on frontend and
product development. He is currently at Symphony.is (Dec 2022 – present)
working on an AI-powered platform for managing real-estate for homeowners, and
uses AI on a daily basis.

Key deliverables at Symphony.is:
- Paginated rich text editor built on TipTap with drag-and-drop block support
  and modern document-editing UX
- Centralized SignalR React library with custom hooks, connection persistence,
  auto-reconnect, and multi-hub subscription management
- Microfrontends and shared npm packages included across a fashion retail & apparel system
- SSR Analytics Dashboard in Next.js featuring interactive charts, a calendar
  widget with date-range selection, and dynamic navigation
- Full-stack Booking Platform MVP connecting service providers with consumers
  via competence matching
- CRM tool for HR teams, refining UX and organizing complex workflows ahead of
  company-wide rollout

Previously at Wiser Technology (ex Badin Soft) (Dec 2020 – Nov 2022):
- Real-time user analytics platform (feature development + CI/CD with Jenkins)
- Video Management System (ongoing feature delivery and quality maintenance)
- Four media portal frontends (pixel-perfect implementation)

## Technical Skills

Core: TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Vue, Node.js, Express
Rich text / realtime: TipTap, SignalR
Styling: CSS, SCSS, PostCSS, HTML
Tooling: Vite, Webpack, npm, pnpm
Testing: Vitest, Jest, Cypress
CI/CD & infra: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Docker
Databases: Cloud Firestore
State management: Redux, Jotai, Zod

## Platforms & Concepts

Microfrontends, SSR, Vercel, Firebase, Google Cloud Platform, Google API,
SonarQube, Azure Application Insights, GitFlow, Trunk-Based Development,
CI/CD, Feature Flags, Kanban, Scrum

## Role Interests

He is open to the following roles:
- Software Engineer
- Frontend Engineer
- Full-Stack Engineer (frontend-leaning)
